scenario: Apex Bank deploys a Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot worker fleet of 60 workers that requires mutual TLS against a private gRPC gateway. The configuration still uses the legacy zeebe.client.security prefix for the CA certificate path and the platform team must move to the documented replacement key in the 8.8 properties reference before the certificate rotation window.
question: Which property listed in the Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot starter reference replaces the legacy zeebe.client.security.cert-path key?

options.text: The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.security.cert-path key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.ca-certificate-path under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.security.cert-path key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.security.cert-path under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.security.cert-path key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.tls.cert-path under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.security.cert-path key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.cert-path under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.

a.text: Correct. The properties reference maps zeebe.client.security.cert-path to camunda.client.ca-certificate-path, making the CA trust anchor an explicit top-level client setting in 8.8.

b.text: Incorrect. The 8.8 reference removes the security segment in the replacement; camunda.client.security.cert-path is not listed in the properties table.

c.text: Incorrect. There is no camunda.client.tls branch in the 8.8 properties reference; TLS trust material lives under camunda.client.ca-certificate-path instead.

d.text: Incorrect. The replacement key spells out ca-certificate-path to mark it as the CA trust file; camunda.client.cert-path is not listed in the 8.8 properties reference.

explanation: The 8.8 Spring Boot starter exposes TLS trust material as camunda.client.ca-certificate-path at the top of the camunda.client namespace; this is the documented replacement for zeebe.client.security.cert-path.
